# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

```yaml
admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy-admin-access.log
  address:
    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 9901 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        config:
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: service_0
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/api/service1" }
                route: { cluster: service1 }
              - match: { prefix: "/api/service2" }
                route: { cluster: service2 }
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
  clusters:
  - name: service1
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts: [{ socket_address: { address: api-service1, port_value: 80 } }]
    http_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers: { thresholds: { max_pending_requests: 2147483648 } }
  - name: service2
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    hosts: [{ socket<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>
